html:
Exclusive to:

Desiccant Pouch can be crafted at level 1 of the Combriner. When in inventory, it absorbs moisture. Once it reaches full moisture, it can be dried by placing it near a Campfire or a Dwarf Star.

Desiccant Sack

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Desiccant Sack can be crafted at level 2 of the Combriner. When in inventory, it absorbs moisture 1.5× better than Desiccant Pouch. Once it reaches full moisture, it can be dried by placing it near a Campfire or a Dwarf Star.

Trivia

  • The Desiccant Pouch and Desiccant Sack were added in the Winter's Feast 2025 update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Desiccant Pouch
"It's important to keep drying!"
Object Info
Does not stack
Crafting
×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"desiccant"
Exclusive to:
“Just dry and dry again!”
–Wilson
“I love this stuff.”
–Willow
“Nice, Wolfgang hate being all wet.”
–Wolfgang
“It can't dry away all my tears.”
–Wendy
“MINE”
–WX-78
“It will help me be rid of excess moisture.”
–Wickerbottom
“Remember how much it rained back home, Luce?”
–Woodie
“A rudimentary ward against dampness.”
–Maxwell
“I hath been warned by my allies nöt tö taste it.”
–Wigfrid
“It keeps our fur from getting too wet.”
–Webber
“It whisks the moisture away.”
–Warly
“Make unwet!”
–Wormwood
“It'll help with the damp.”
–Winona
“Don't cry! It will dry!”
–Wortox
“Make me dry!”
–Wurt
“No more wet dog smell for you, Woby!”
–Walter
“It should keep me from getting too waterlogged.”
–Wanda
Desiccant Pouch can be crafted at level 1 of the Combriner. When in inventory, it absorbs moisture. Once it reaches full moisture, it can be dried by placing it near a Campfire or a Dwarf Star.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Desiccant Sack[edit | edit source]
Desiccant Sack
"It absorbs moisture so you don't have to!"
Object Info
Does not stack
Crafting
×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"desiccantboosted"
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
“It leaves me high and dry!”
–Wilson
“Moisture is the enemy!"”
–Willow
“Is mightier dry powder!”
–Wolfgang
“I can't remember the last time my eyes were dry.”
–Wendy
“ALL MINE”
–WX-78
“This should keep me comfortably dry.”
–Wickerbottom
“Take that, rain!”
–Woodie
“A more robust ward against dampness.”
–Maxwell
“My allies spöke true... sample nöt fröm the wicked salt bag!”
–Wigfrid
“You can't get us, water!”
–Webber
“It keeps me drier than hardtack.”
–Warly
“No wet?”
–Wormwood
“Yup, that's the good stuff.”
–Winona
“A real champ against the damp!”
–Wortox
“Stop me dry? Glurph!”
–Wurt
“It sure keeps me nice and dry.”
–Walter
“I won't have to worry about getting soggy!”
–Wanda
Desiccant Sack can be crafted at level 2 of the Combriner. When in inventory, it absorbs moisture 1.5× better than Desiccant Pouch. Once it reaches full moisture, it can be dried by placing it near a Campfire or a Dwarf Star.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Desiccant Pouch and Desiccant Sack were added in the Winter's Feast 2025 update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Túi hút ẩm có thể được chế tạo ở cấp độ 1 của Combriner. Khi ở trong kho, nó sẽ hấp thụ độ ẩm. Khi đạt đến độ ẩm tối đa, nó có thể được làm khô bằng cách đặt gần Lửa trại hoặc Sao lùn.
title: Desiccant Pouch

'''Desiccant Pouch''' can be crafted at level 1 of the [[Combriner]]. When in inventory, it absorbs moisture. Once it reaches full moisture, it can be dried by placing it near a {{DSTL|Campfire}} or a {{DSTL|Dwarf Star}}.

=={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage==

|count1 = 1
|item2 = Desiccant Pouch
|count2 = 1
|tool = Combriner
|result = Desiccant Sack
}}
{{clear}}
